name: ckk-shared-db
description: Single source of truth for the CKK shared database (Prisma multi-schema)

scripts.import:legacy: sh -c '. ./.env 2>/dev/null || true; for f in ../data-migration/imports/*.sql.gz; do echo "== $f"; gunzip -c "$f" | psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q; done'
scripts.import:legacy:remote: scripts/remote-db.sh sh -c 'for f in ../data-migration/imports/*.sql.gz; do echo "== $f"; gunzip -c "$f" | psql "$DATABASE_URL" -v ON_ERROR_STOP=1 -q; done'
